problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
